svg.text: Application Flow: Our System, Polaris, and Response Actions
Generated from app_flow.mmd. Each row shows the user/system action, local database/process work, Polaris or external integration work, and final response state.

g.text: Admin saves active product configs transaction configs dynamic field
No Polaris call during save but values map to future prodCode brchCode
Config becomes active or operation is blocked if config is missing
Create merchant_profiles pos_terminals merchant portal users and
Merchant becomes active only after terminal and Polaris account
Save merchant passive and settlement accounts in polaris_accounts and
Create or register merchant passive and settlement account acntCode
BNPL invoices are allowed only when merchant status is active and

Return OTP verified registration state or reject duplicate phone
Create user_sessions and update device login metadata
Return access token refresh token and active session or reject
Enable transaction authorization or lock revoke credential on failed
Save dan_verifications and update customer identity verification state
No Polaris call unless DAN success triggers CIF step
Continue to CIF creation on verified result or mark failed expired
Update customer_profiles with identity data and enqueue
Call cif/createPerson and if duplicate found search/update with
Save polaris_cust_code and polaris_cif_status synced or
Store deposit acntCode set account active or pending_reconcile if
Sync changed customer data to Polaris using cif/updatePerson and
Set local KYC verified only when required local data and Polaris
Set relevant kyc_* rows rejected or kyc_verification_steps manual
If data was already synced then update Polaris customer status or risk
Stop line activation and show rejected or manual review status to
Save hur_data_snapshots with raw response hash and extracted data
External HUR service only no Polaris write
Use snapshots for scoring or mark score unavailable if HUR fails
Save sain_score_requests with FICO sain score risk grade and raw
External Sain/FICO service only no Polaris write
Continue custom scoring or reject score if response is invalid
Create credit_score_results and credit_scoring_factors with final
score custom score FICO score model version and grade
Return eligible ineligible or manual review decision
Call cif/updatePerson with score risk grade model version and
Allow active limit only after sync succeeded or approved manual
Create or update loan_limits with max_total_limit product limits
No Polaris write inside local limit creation
Customer can see offer only if KYC score deposit account and config
Create credit_line_accounts using active loan_limit customer deposit
Store line acntCode in polaris_accounts and set credit_line_accounts
Update loan_limits and credit_line_accounts after risk refresh using
Call line/adjustLineAccountLimit if line amount changes
Increase applies immediately; decrease below utilized suspends new
drawdowns instead of breaking existing loans
Create loan_applications draft then submitted with requested amount
term product and customer deposit account
Return validation errors if inactive KYC inactive deposit inactive
line expired limit or amount too high
Create pos_payment_invoices pos_qr_codes and pending pos_transactions
with merchant terminal and cart snapshot
Return QR to merchant POS if merchant terminal active and invoice
Attach customer_id selected installment option and product terms to
Continue to reservation if customer is eligible or reject invoice
Lock credit_line_accounts row and create credit_limit_reservations
Available amount equals line_amount minus utilized_amount minus
Update loan_applications approved pending_core_setup or rejected
No Polaris write if rejected; approved proceeds to child loan setup
Rejected or cancelled releases reservation and returns reason
Proceed only when authorization is valid not expired and amount
Create loans row pending_core_setup and loan_core_steps
Store child loan acntCode in polaris_accounts or keep
Create loan_core_steps calculate_schedule and store calculated
Show final repayment terms or fail before grant if calculation is
Insert repayment_schedules only after Polaris schedule is confirmed
Set schedule_status succeeded only when local schedule matches
Grant is blocked until link confirmed succeeded
Create ledger_journals ledger_entries and update loans grant_status
Call loan/grantLoanNonCash from child loan account to customer deposit
Store grant_polaris_jrno set loan active application disbursed
Set loan grant_status pending_reconcile and queue reconciliation with
detail and deposit detail before retry
If matching jrno exists mark success; if no match retry same key; if
Run same child loan grant into customer deposit and set loan
Call loan/grantLoanNonCash from child loan account to customer deposit
Do not approve POS yet because merchant passive transfer is still
Create merchant transfer ledger_journals and update pos_transactions
Call tllrcasa/internalCasaTransaction from customer deposit to
Set POS approved and loan active only after transfer jrno is
Create pos_terminal_callbacks with unique idempotency key and callback
External merchant POS callback approved rejected or timeout
Retry callback delivery without repeating loan grant or merchant
Create qpay_repayment_invoices for loan schedule or manual target
External QPay invoice creation if provider is used
Return payable invoice to customer or reject duplicate active
Save qpay_repayment_callbacks and create or find
External QPay callback validation by payment id signature amount and
Duplicate qpay_payment_id is ignored and invalid callback is failed
Create inbound ledger_journal and set repayment_transactions
Call configured inbound transfer such as tllrbac/transactionBacToCasa
from bank or repayment pool to customer deposit
Proceed to loan payment only after inbound jrno is confirmed
Create loan payment ledger_journal and update repayment transaction
Store loan_payment_polaris_jrno or set pending_reconcile on unknown
Lock repayment_schedules rows and insert repayment_allocations by
No additional Polaris write after loan payment unless adjustment
Update schedules pending partial paid and prevent allocation above
Update repayment_transactions completed and schedule partial when
No extra Polaris call after confirmed loan payment
Show remaining due and next due date to customer
Reject or hold excess amount based on configured policy and keep
transaction pending manual review if needed
If money already moved query Polaris statement and create refund or
Prevent paid amount from exceeding total due
Check all repayment_schedules paid and loan balance candidate zero
Proceed to close only when Polaris closing detail confirms payable
Update loans closing state and create close ledger_journal if needed
Set loans closed reduce credit_line_accounts utilized_amount and
Mark due unpaid repayment_schedules overdue and create penalty_records
No Polaris call unless penalty must be synced or posted
Notify customer and include overdue state in reporting
Create repayment_cashback_records and wallet transactions when
Optional configured Polaris transfer if reward money moves to customer
Credit reward once only or mark failed pending retry
Create merchant_settlements and merchant_settlement_items for approved
Optional tmm/selectSettleFintxn or configured settlement transfer
Settlement remains pending until finance approves or scheduled job
Create settlement ledger_journal and update settlement processing
Call configured merchant passive to settlement or bank transfer
Set settlement completed with jrno or pending_reconcile on timeout
Create merchant_refund_requests and validate loan POS settlement state
No Polaris write until refund is approved
Reject invalid duplicate or over amount refund requests
Reverse merchant passive transfer then adjust or reverse loan
Call gen/doReverseTxn or gen/undoTransaction for original merchant
transfer jrno and related loan journals if required
Mark refund processed only when every dependency reversal is
Create settlement offset or reverse settlement first according to
Call gen/doReverseTxn or gen/undoTransaction only once per original
Create payable adjustment or reversed settlement item and require
Set source row and polaris_sync_queue to pending_reconcile not failed
details using reference amount date account and idempotency key
Resolve to success retry same key or dead_letter manual review
Set source row failed and save error details in
No retry unless failure is classified retryable and no journal exists
Return deterministic failure message and release reservation if safe
Read ledger_journals ledger_entries polaris_accounts loans schedules
Call gen/getTmwJournalList gen/getAccountStatement and account detail
Mark matched reconciled mismatched or dead_letter and create audit
Check service_pause_windows before repayment BNPL disbursement Polaris
Return retryable service paused response and do not create duplicate
Read reporting views audit_logs ledger_journals repayment and
Optional Polaris statement query for finance report validation
Create audit_logs operation_type read_sensitive or export with actor
Create audit_logs only for business security financial status changes
Every status transition has one status_change audit row; runtime
Create ledger_journals and ledger_entries for every grant merchant
transfer repayment close settlement refund and reversal
Store Polaris jrno returned by money moving APIs
Ledger is financial fact table and reconciliation source
Create polaris_api_logs and polaris_operation_attempts for every
All Polaris write attempts are linked to polaris_sync_queue
Support replay diagnosis timeout resolution and audit traceability

svg.text: Status rule: failed = confirmed failure; pending_reconcile = unknown Polaris result; dead_letter = unresolved after automated reconciliation.
